title: Coast Guard Interdicts Over $63 Million in Illicit Drugs
description: The crew aboard the Coast Guard cutter Bear offloaded approximately 7,720 pounds of cocaine and 4,000 pounds of marijuana worth more than $63 million at Port Everglades, Fla.

body.text: The crew aboard the Coast Guard cutter Bear offloaded approximately 7,720 pounds of cocaine and 4,000 pounds of marijuana worth more than $63 million at Port Everglades, Florida, June 26.

A Coast Guard cutter Bear boarding team interdicts a suspected drug-smuggling vessel in the Eastern Pacific Ocean, June 11, 2026. The Bear and an embarked Helicopter Interdiction Tactical Squadron aviation detachment interdicted the vessel, seizing approximately 4,000 pounds of marijuana.
